title: ACE Studio and EASTWEST Sounds partnership
text:
Published 27/1/26
AI technology to integrate with EastWest’s virtual instruments
ACE Studio
have announced a strategic partnership with
EastWest Sounds
, bringing together ACE Studio’s AI-based performance technology with EastWest’s established range of professional virtual instruments. The collaboration is intended to support modern, computer-based music production with tools that are faster to work with while remaining suitable for professional use.
EastWest Sounds is one of the longest-standing names in music software, with virtual instruments widely used in film, television, games, and commercial music production. The company has received more than 100 industry awards, including multiple NAMM TEC Awards for musical instrument software.
ACE Studio focuses on expressive performance rather than automatic song creation. Its platform is designed around detailed control of AI-based instruments using MIDI and performance data, allowing musicians to shape phrasing, articulation, and expression in a way that fits established production workflows.
Doug Rogers, Founder & Producer at EastWest
: EastWest has always been about pushing the boundaries of sound. By teaming up with ACE Studio, we’re embracing AI as a powerful creative ally — one that enhances workflow without compromising musicality.
Through this partnership, the two companies plan to combine EastWest’s sound libraries with ACE Studio’s AI technology to improve realism and reduce the time required to achieve finished results. The aim is to simplify technical processes while preserving the sound quality and control expected by professional composers and producers.
Further information on planned software integrations and future developments will be announced in the coming months.
www.soundsonline.com
